task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the required page header and footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page header at the top margin containing 'PROJECT: Harborview Medical Center Expansion' on the left and 'SECTION 09 30 13' on the right. Look for a page number in the footer at the bottom margin.

task_completion.description: Verify the document follows the 3-Part CSI MasterFormat with appropriate headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'PART 1 - GENERAL', 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS', and 'PART 3 - EXECUTION' formatted as headings (e.g., larger, bolder text compared to the body paragraphs).

task_completion.description: Verify Part 2 specifies the required materials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look under the 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS' section for text explicitly mentioning 'Tile T-1', 'Tile T-2', 'Mortar', and 'Grout'.

task_completion.description: Verify Part 3 includes the Tile Schedule table with required columns and rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look under the 'PART 3 - EXECUTION' section for a visible table titled 'Tile Schedule'. The table must have columns for 'Mark', 'Material', 'Finish', 'Size', and 'Location', and contain data rows for 'T-1' and 'T-2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct name and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the LibreOffice Writer window showing '093013_Ceramic_Tiling.odt', or a file manager window showing this file in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a word processor GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent interacting with LibreOffice Writer (or a similar word processor), rather than generating the .odt file purely via terminal commands or a python script.

integrity.description: Verify the Tile Schedule is an actual table element.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table in Part 3 should have visible cell borders or gridlines typical of a word processor table, not just plain text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Verify the header and footer features of the word processor were used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The header and footer text should appear in the designated top and bottom margin areas of the page layout, often indicated by a distinct boundary or lighter text color when editing the main body, rather than just being typed as the first and last lines of the main text body.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be a CSI MasterFormat 3-part specification for 'Harborview Medical Center Expansion', section '09 30 13 - Ceramic Tiling'. It must include PART 1 - GENERAL, PART 2 - PRODUCTS, and PART 3 - EXECUTION using Heading styles. Part 2 must mention Tile T-1 (Porcelain Floor Tile), Tile T-2 (Glazed Ceramic Wall Tile), Mortar (ANSI A118.4), and Grout. Part 3 must contain a Tile Schedule table with Mark, Material, Finish, Size, and Location for T-1 and T-2. The output file must be saved as '093013_Ceramic_Tiling.odt' in /home/ga/Documents/.
